title: Hedysarum hedysaroides
taxonomy: Hedysarum hedysaroides is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the tribe Hedysareae and is native to Asia. This plant is also known as a type of sweet pea or jointvetch. The classification of Hedysarum hedysaroides places it within the subfamily Faboideae. It is closely related to other species within the same genus and family.
